name: Arch-Hierarch
xp_description: Gain 1 XP every time you successfully activate a Non-Unit card during the Preparations Phase.

levels.name: Efficient Tithe
levels.description: Once per turn during your Draw Phase, you may convert 2 Rations into 1 Special Resource of your choice.

levels.name: Holy Aegis
levels.description: During the Siege Phase, whenever you activate a Non-Unit card, you may choose one of your Units. it gains +1 Will until the end of the Phase.

levels.name: Miracle of Faith
levels.description: Once per game, during the Preparations Phase, you may pay 1 Sacrifice and 1 Faith. Return a Felled Unit from your Grave directly to one of your Battalions face-down.
